snippets.title: Python client
snippets.code:
import requests

API_KEY = "your_api_key_here"
BASE_URL = "https://api.limiter.io/v1"

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {API_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

# Create a rate limit rule
rule = {
    "name": "api-rule",
    "route": "/api/*",
    "max_req": 1000,
    "window_ms": 60000
}
response = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/projects/{project_id}/rules",
                         json=rule, headers=headers)
print(response.json())

snippets.title: Go client
snippets.code:
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	apiKey := "your_api_key_here"
	projectID := "your_project_id"
	
	rule := map[string]interface{}{
		"name":     "my-rule",
		"route":    "/api/*",
		"max_req":  100,
		"window_ms": 60000,
	}
	body, _ := json.Marshal(rule)
	
	req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST",
		fmt.Sprintf("https://api.limiter.io/v1/projects/%s/rules", projectID),
		bytes.NewBuffer(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+apiKey)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	
	client := &http.Client{}
	resp, _ := client.Do(req)
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	
	var result map[string]interface{}
	json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result)
	fmt.Printf("Rule created: %+v\n", result)
}

snippets.title: Node.js / TypeScript
Ruby client
snippets.code:
require 'net/http'
require 'json'

API_KEY = 'your_api_key_here'
BASE_URL = 'https://api.limiter.io/v1'

uri = URI("#{BASE_URL}/projects/{project_id}/rules")
http = Net::HTTP.new(uri.host, uri.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(uri)
request['Authorization'] = "Bearer #{API_KEY}"
request['Content-Type'] = 'application/json'
request.body = {
  name: 'my-rule',
  route: '/api/*',
  max_req: 100,
  window_ms: 60000
}.to_json

response = http.request(request)
puts response.body
